name: Chicken Chow Mein #2
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked chicken, cut into large bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the celery stalks and cut them diagonally into 1-inch pieces.
2. In a large skillet, heat oil and cook onions until slightly soft.
3. Add celery, mushrooms, and 1 1/2 cups chicken broth to the skillet. Cook over low heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add water chestnuts, bean sprouts, and bamboo shoots to the skillet.
5. In a small bowl, mix cornstarch, soy sauce, and 1/2 cup chicken broth until smooth.
6. Stir the cornstarch mixture into the large skillet with the cooked meat, ground pepper, and celery.
7. Simmer for 10 minutes, tasting for seasoning as needed. Adjust seasoning by adding more soy sauce if desired.
